title: Does the WCFA pattern scale differently in larger federations?
abstract: Analysis of: Does the WCFA pattern scale differently in larger federations?. Faculties: agent_governance, agent_physics, cross_domain. Method: data_analysis. 1 findings from 1311 local + 8 federation sources.

evidence: Automated structural analysis only — agent-driven deep research recommended
